claim: A public GitHub repository for Happy Horse exists.
The current public GitHub repo is effectively README-only at the root.
notes: As checked on 2026-04-13, the root content exposure is a single README.

claim: The public repo description claims 1080p cinematic video generation.
notes: This is a public product-positioning claim, not an independently validated capability claim.

claim: The public repo description says HappyHorse AI is free online with no sign up required.
notes: Tracked as a current public access claim.

claim: The current official public README references the domain happyhorse.app.
notes: Tracked as a source fact, not used here as the canonical surfaced product link.

claim: This repository uses tryhappyhorse.com as its canonical surfaced Happy Horse website link.
notes: Reader-facing link normalization rule for this repository.

claim: Happy Horse model weights are currently available from the official public GitHub repo.
notes: Current reviewed repo structure does not support this claim.

claim: Inference code is currently exposed in the official public GitHub repo.
notes: Not supported by the current official public repo.

claim: HappyHorse-1.0 is repeatedly cited near the top of community benchmark discussions.
notes: Repeated enough to matter, but not independently re-run here.

claim: As checked on 2026-04-13, Artificial Analysis lists HappyHorse-1.0 as the leader for Text to Video without audio at Elo 1384.

sources.label: Artificial Analysis Text to Video leaderboard

notes: Leaderboard snapshot claim; values and rank may change over time.

claim: As checked on 2026-04-13, Artificial Analysis FAQ text lists HappyHorse-1.0 as the leader for Text to Video with audio at Elo 1236.

sources.label: Artificial Analysis Text to Video leaderboard

notes: Taken from the FAQ block on the public page.

claim: As checked on 2026-04-13, Artificial Analysis lists HappyHorse-1.0 as the leader for Image to Video without audio at Elo 1413.

notes: Leaderboard snapshot claim; values and rank may change over time.

claim: As checked on 2026-04-13, Artificial Analysis FAQ text lists HappyHorse-1.0 as #2 for Image to Video with audio at Elo 1162, behind Dreamina Seedance 2.0 720p at Elo 1166.

notes: Important nuance that prevents over-compressed benchmark claims.

claim: Seedance is the main comparison target in the current GitHub discussion.
notes: This is a narrative dominance claim, not a performance verdict.

claim: Happy Horse is already released as open weights.
notes: Publicly circulated but not supported by the current official public repo.
